mapper.select: select id, user_id, label, url, sort_order, create_time, update_time from user_profile_link where user_id=#{userId} order by sort_order, id
mapper.insert: insert into user_profile_link (user_id, label, url, sort_order, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{label}, #{url}, #{sortOrder}, now(), now())
